  • Sanctuary Gorilla Forest Camp

Uganda • Forest safari camp

Sanctuary Gorilla Forest Camp

A long-established forest camp positioned inside the Bwindi area for early gorilla-trekking starts and a quieter rainforest stay.

4.8 318 reviews · Bwindi Impenetrable National Park, Buhoma sector · From $800 / night
Image slot Stay Sanctuary Gorilla Forest Camp

Property

Forest safari camp

Location

Bwindi Impenetrable National Park, Buhoma sector

Guest rating

4.8 / 5

From

From $800 / night

About this stay

This is a premium choice for travelers who want the lodge itself to feel connected to the gorilla trekking landscape. It suits guests who value forest atmosphere, guide coordination, and avoiding unnecessary transfers on permit days.

Why it works for this route

Confirm the trekking sector before booking. Bwindi permits are sector-specific, so the best lodge is the one that matches the assigned gorilla family departure point.

Amenities

  • Forest setting
  • Gorilla trekking logistics
  • All-inclusive camp style
  • Guide coordination

Best nearby attraction

Bwindi Impenetrable National Park is the clearest anchor for this stay.

Where to book

From $800 / night

Bwindi Impenetrable National Park, Buhoma sector
